name: Ubuntu
core_principle: I am because we are - collective humanity and interdependence
ethical_guidance: Act with compassion; prioritize community wellbeing; seek consensus
related_proverbs: Umuntu ngumuntu ngabantu (A person is a person through other people)

name: Ukama
core_principle: Interconnectedness of all things - web of relationships
manifestation: Extended family systems|communal land ownership|mutual obligation
ethical_guidance: Honor all relationships; recognize interdependence; maintain balance
related_proverbs: Ukama igasva hunozadziswa nekudya (Kinship is never complete without sharing food)

name: Ujamaa
core_principle: Familyhood and collective cooperation - African socialism
ethical_guidance: Share resources; work collectively; build communal prosperity
related_proverbs: Haba na haba hujaza kibaba (Little by little fills the measure)

name: Sankofa
core_principle: Learn from the past to build the future - historical wisdom
ethical_guidance: Honor ancestors; learn from history; carry wisdom forward
related_proverbs: Se wo were fi na wosankofa a yenkyi (It is not taboo to go back and fetch what you forgot)

name: Ma'at
core_principle: Truth|balance|order|harmony|justice - cosmic equilibrium
ethical_guidance: Speak truth; maintain balance; act with justice; honor divine order
related_proverbs: The heart must be lighter than the feather of Ma'at

name: Ntu
core_principle: Vital force present in all beings - life energy
ethical_guidance: Increase life force; connect with ancestors; honor spiritual energy
related_proverbs: Muntu ke muntu ka batho (A person is a person through people)

name: Hunhu/Unhu
core_principle: Personhood and moral integrity - becoming fully human
ethical_guidance: Build good character; act with integrity; respect others
related_proverbs: Munhu munhu nevanhu (A person is a person through others)

name: Batho Pele
core_principle: People first - service to community above self
ethical_guidance: Put people first; serve community; lead with humility
related_proverbs: Umntu akalahlwa (A person is not thrown away)

name: Harambee
core_principle: Pulling together - collective self-help and mutual assistance
ethical_guidance: Work together; help each other; build collectively
related_proverbs: Watu wawili wanapopigana ziumiazo ni nyasi (When two elephants fight the grass suffers)

name: Ujaama
core_principle: Extended familyhood - beyond blood relations
ethical_guidance: Welcome strangers; share resources; extend family bonds
related_proverbs: Mgeni njoo mwenyeji apone (Welcome the guest so the host may prosper)

name: Nia
core_principle: Purpose and collective vocation - community mission
ethical_guidance: Define purpose; work toward collective goals; serve community vision
related_proverbs: Kazi bila nia ni mauti (Work without purpose is death)

name: Kujichagulia
core_principle: Self-determination and autonomy - defining oneself
ethical_guidance: Define yourself; determine your path; claim autonomy
related_proverbs: Jina lako ni mali yako (Your name is your wealth)

name: Umoja
core_principle: Unity and togetherness - collective solidarity
ethical_guidance: Unite for common cause; build solidarity; work together
related_proverbs: Umoja ni nguvu utengano ni udhaifu (Unity is strength division is weakness)

name: Ujima
core_principle: Collective work and responsibility - shared burden
ethical_guidance: Share burdens; work together; take collective responsibility
related_proverbs: Haba na haba hujaza kibaba (Little by little fills the measure)

name: Nia ya Jamii
core_principle: Community purpose - collective vision and goals
ethical_guidance: Align individual goals with community; serve collective vision
related_proverbs: Kidole kimoja hakivunji chawa (One finger cannot crush a louse)

name: Nommo
core_principle: Generative power of the word - creative speech
ethical_guidance: Speak with care; honor your word; create through speech
related_proverbs: Neno ni fedha kimya ni dhahabu (Speech is silver silence is golden)

name: Maat
core_principle: Cosmic justice and balance - universal order
ethical_guidance: Maintain cosmic order; judge fairly; seek truth
related_proverbs: Ma'at is the food of the gods

name: Kuumba
core_principle: Creativity and innovation - building legacy
ethical_guidance: Create beauty; innovate solutions; leave legacy
related_proverbs: Mti ukigwa huegemea mti (When a tree falls it leans on another)

name: Imani
core_principle: Faith in community - belief in collective potential
ethical_guidance: Have faith in people; believe in community; trust collective wisdom
related_proverbs: Imani ni utajiri (Faith is wealth)

name: Communalism
core_principle: Priority of community over individual - collective wellbeing
ethical_guidance: Prioritize community; share resources; decide collectively
related_proverbs: Moja kwa moja ni riziki ya Mungu (One by one is God's provision)

name: Palaver
core_principle: Extended dialogue and consensus - thorough discussion
ethical_guidance: Discuss thoroughly; seek consensus; hear all voices
related_proverbs: Ndege hapo mku wa mwenzake (A bird does not drink where another bird is drinking)

name: Mojo
core_principle: Spiritual power and influence - sacred energy
ethical_guidance: Use power wisely; honor spiritual forces; channel energy
related_proverbs: Nguvu ya mungu (Power of God)

name: Ashanti Stool
core_principle: Sacred authority and ancestral connection - throne of power
ethical_guidance: Honor ancestors; respect authority; maintain tradition
related_proverbs: Akoma ntoaso (Joined hearts)

name: Mawu-Lisa
core_principle: Divine duality - cosmic balance of opposites
ethical_guidance: Honor duality; seek balance; embrace complementarity
related_proverbs: Mawu creates Lisa completes

name: Odinani
core_principle: Divine order and natural law - cosmic harmony
ethical_guidance: Follow natural law; honor cycles; maintain harmony
related_proverbs: Onye aghana nwanne ya (No one should forget their brother)

name: Orisa
core_principle: Divine forces and spiritual principles - sacred powers
ethical_guidance: Honor spiritual forces; worship properly; seek divine guidance
related_proverbs: Orisa ko mo eni ti o ko (The Orisha does not know who did not worship)

name: Vodun
core_principle: Spiritual forces and divine mysteries - sacred power
ethical_guidance: Respect spiritual forces; honor mysteries; channel divinity
related_proverbs: Vodun ma nya deka o (Vodun is not one)
